{{Quote|Yeah, we're flying to the cantina, but don't get your hopes up…|[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]|<ref name="trt" />}}
'''Zio Snaffkin''', also known as '''Zio Snaffkin Spaceport''' was a major [[City/Legends|city]] on [[Dennogra/Legends|Dennogra]]. It was the home of [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorian]] [[Merchant/Legends|trader]] [[Sprool]], who was known to frequent the [[Zio Snaffkin Cantina]].<ref name="trt" />

{{City-stub}}
